'''gazosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldhead|oldhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldhead|oldhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gazosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzesheth|gæzesheth]] || [[word:gæzeshej|gæzeshej]] || [[word:gæzeshesh|gæzeshesh]] || [[word:gæzeshe|gæzeshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazozoshoth|gazozoshoth]] || [[word:gazozoshoj|gazozoshoj]] || [[word:gazozoshosh|gazozoshosh]] || [[word:gazozosho|gazozosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazoshoth|gazoshoth]] || [[word:gazoshoj|gazoshoj]] || [[word:gazoshosh|gazoshosh]] || [[word:gazosho|gazosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazofshoth|gazofshoth]] || [[word:gazofshoj|gazofshoj]] || [[word:gazofshosh|gazofshosh]] || [[word:gazofshof|gazofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazoshotho|gazoshotho]] || [[word:gazoshojo|gazoshojo]] || [[word:gazoshosho|gazoshosho]] || [[word:gazoshoko|gazoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazoshoth|gazoshoth]] || [[word:gazoshoj|gazoshoj]] || [[word:gazoshosh|gazoshosh]] || [[word:gazosho|gazosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazoshothol|gazoshothol]] || [[word:gazoshojol|gazoshojol]] || [[word:gazoshoshol|gazoshoshol]] || [[word:gazoshokol|gazoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazoshothotho|gazoshothotho]] || [[word:gazoshojojo|gazoshojojo]] || [[word:gazoshoshosho|gazoshoshosho]] || [[word:gazoshoko|gazoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazoshothon|gazoshothon]] || [[word:gazoshojon|gazoshojon]] || [[word:gazoshoshon|gazoshoshon]] || [[word:gazoshokon|gazoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazoshothoro|gazoshothoro]] || [[word:gazoshojoro|gazoshojoro]] || [[word:gazoshoshoro|gazoshoshoro]] || [[word:gazoshokoro|gazoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
